title: Enable chat-first AI contribution workflow for patch-only repo changes
scope: Add a helper to generate Work Order JSON files with predictable IDs
Add a helper to build a reusable AI task packet from repo context
Add a helper to extract unified diff patches from AI markdown responses
Document the no-IDE conversational workflow for external AI chats
acceptance_criteria: A new Work Order JSON can be generated from the command line without manual ID math
A task packet can be generated for external AI chats with AGENTS and control-plane context
A markdown response from an AI chat can be converted to a standalone unified diff patch file
Repository docs describe the end-to-end no-IDE conversational patch workflow
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Large task packets can exceed context windows on smaller models; users should limit file selection
Patch extraction expects fenced code blocks and will fail fast when missing
rollback_plan: Remove the helper scripts and documentation updates introduced by this work order
